chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: Master table containing unique customer records, identified by CUST_ID as the primary key, serving as the authoritative source for customer data.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is a person (or account) who purchases goods/services from the company, identified by a unique customer ID and associated with contact information and delivery/billing addresses; refunds are issued to this entity.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
KEY Attributes - Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item in a sales order representing a single product entry with quantity and unit price for that order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
-

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment is the financial transaction record in the business domain representing a customer's payment for a Sales Order, identified by a unique Payment ID, including method, amount, timestamp, and status, and associated with exactly one Sales Order (a Sales Order may have multiple Payments).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single product item (SKU) listed as a line item on a sales order, including quantity and unit price.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Product Relationships**:
- A Product belongs to exactly one Category | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Sales Order Header (SALES_ORDER_HDR) is the data entity containing the header information for each customer order, identified by ORDER_ID and including a CUST_ID foreign key referencing the Customer Master.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the logistics unit representing goods associated with a single Sales Order, identified by a unique Shipment ID, with a source warehouse, destination address, shipped timestamp, tracking number, and status (e.g., PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category(Category Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product's reference to its category, represented as the CATEGORY_ID foreign key in the TB_PRODUCT table, linking a product to the category it belongs to.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Unique Customer Identifier
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique identifier used to distinctly identify a customer in the dataset (as described by the CUST_ID column).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Full Refund
entities_post_resolution.definition: A monetary reimbursement to a customer for a returned product or cancelled order, typically equal to the full purchase price as specified by the company's return/refund policy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: 30 Days Of Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, region classification, account creation timestamp, and active status for business operations.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, SKU, name, category, price, and whether the product is active for sale.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category information for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for customer sales orders, including identifiers, ordering date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-level details for each order, including which product was ordered, the quantity, unit price, and the calculated line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
